_comment: Hormonaly MCP Server configuration. Copy to hormonaly-mcp-config.json and fill in your values.

_notes.api_url: Base URL of the Hormonaly platform. Use http://localhost:5000 for local dev.
_notes.helix_api_key: Partner API key for Helix B2B endpoints. Starts with hk_live_
_notes.session_token: Session cookie value (connect.sid) for user-authenticated tools. Get from browser DevTools → Cookies.
_notes.admin_session_token: Admin session cookie. Only needed for admin_* tools.
